name: Java 8 (New)
description: Evaluates core Java syntax, object-oriented programming, exception handling, collections, and multithreading for entry to mid-level developers.

name: Python (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of Python syntax, data structures, OOP, and standard library usage for software developer roles.

name: SQL (New)
description: Measures ability to write and interpret SQL queries including joins, subqueries, and aggregate functions.

name: OPQ32r
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire assessing 32 personality dimensions relevant to workplace behavior, including stakeholder management, teamwork, and leadership style.

name: General Ability Test (GSA)
description: A short-form cognitive ability assessment measuring numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning for general employability screening.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures ability to interpret numerical data, statistics, and tables to make logical business decisions.

name: Situational Judgement Test - Stakeholder Management
description: Presents realistic workplace scenarios involving cross-functional stakeholders to evaluate judgement, communication, and conflict resolution.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests core JavaScript concepts including closures, asynchronous programming, DOM manipulation, and ES6+ syntax.
